Preference.android:title: Rate App
Preference.android:summary: Thanks! I appreciate feedback and feature requests

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Makes full screen mode larger by occupying the space around camera notches
SwitchPreference.android:title: Enable Full Screen Notch Mode

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Enable to lock orientation to recommended value.
SwitchPreference.android:title: Use Recommended Orientation

ListPreference.android:summary: Change the render engine if you are having video play issues. Fixes: Stuck on black/white screen, video won't update unless the screen is touched, excess lag, etc.
ListPreference.android:title: Render Engine

Preference.android:title: Join Reddit for Help
Preference.android:summary: Click here to open the subreddit where you can ask for help, report bugs, or request features!

Preference.android:title: Join Discord Server for Help
Preference.android:summary: Click here to join a discord server where you can ask for help, report bugs, or request features. This is the quickest way to get in contact with the app developer!

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Reduce audio latency for a smoother experience.
SwitchPreference.android:title: Enable Audio Low Latency Mode

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Enable vibration for button clicks on the on-screen gamepad
SwitchPreference.android:title: On-Screen Gamepad Vibration

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Rumble your device if there isn't a controller attached that supports rumble
SwitchPreference.android:title: Rumble Device

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Rumble any controllers attached to your device. Requires Android 12+ and a wired connection normally. Try with the different render engines if you have issues.
SwitchPreference.android:title: Rumble Controller

Preference.android:summary: Click to create a new button mapping configuration template for a physical controller
Preference.android:title: Create New Layout

ListPreference.android:summary: Click to select what button mapping config to use (created above) when a physical controller is connected.
ListPreference.android:title: Select Controller Layout

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Invert the tilt direction on the X axis.
SwitchPreference.android:title: Invert Horizontal Tilt

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Invert the tilt direction on the Y axis.
SwitchPreference.android:title: Invert Vertical Tilt

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Tilt Joystick Deadzone
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Select how big the deadzone should be for the tilt joystick.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Tilt Joystick Sensitivity
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Select how sensitive the tilt joystick should be

ListPreference.android:summary: Choose what happens when casting Xbox 360 videos
ListPreference.android:title: Video Convert Prompt

ListPreference.android:summary: Choose the quality of converted Xbox 360 videos. The higher the quality the longer it will take to convert
ListPreference.android:title: Video Convert Quality

ListPreference.android:summary: Choose the size of converted Xbox 360 videos
ListPreference.android:title: Video Convert Size

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Use the legacy theme. Requires app restart.
SwitchPreference.android:title: Use Legacy Theme
